questions.explanation: Reanimated + shared values + worklets for buttery 60fps.

questions.prompt: Why is running animation on JS thread bad?
options: The bridge/render thread can lag if JS is busy — stutters
questions.explanation: That's why Reanimated worklets execute on the UI thread.

options: LayoutAnimation (built-in) or entering/exiting animations from Reanimated
questions.explanation: One line to add smooth 'add/remove' transitions.
